ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the client's account */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of client (e.g., small, medium, enterprise) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the client */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the client's account (e.g., active, suspended, terminated) */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Details of the subscription plan (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client running the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Main objective of the campaign (e.g., brand awareness, lead generation) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Demographic details of the target audience */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic areas targeted by the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., planning, active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_channels" (
  "media_channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media channel */,
  "media_channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the media channel (e.g., social media, digital platforms, print media, out-of-home advertising) */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of media channel (e.g., social, digital, print, out-of-home) */,
  "channel_url" TEXT /* URL for digital media channels */,
  "channel_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the media channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisements" (
  "advertisement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertisement */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign running the advertisement */,
  "media_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media channel used for the advertisement */,
  "advertisement_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertisement */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the advertisement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the advertisement */,
  "ad_type" TEXT /* Type of advertisement (e.g., banner, video, text) */,
  "ad_creative" TEXT /* Description of the ad creative */,
  "ad_link" TEXT /* Link to the advertisement content */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the advertisement (e.g., cost per impression, cost per click) */,
  "target_url" TEXT /* URL to which the ad directs when clicked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advertisement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisements_media_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_channel_id") REFERENCES media_channels ("media_channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisements_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impressions" (
  "impression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impression */,
  "advertisement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertisement generating the impression */,
  "impression_date" TEXT /* Date of the impression */,
  "impression_count" INTEGER /* Number of impressions generated */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the impression */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the impression (e.g., Google, Facebook, Instagram) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impressions_advertisement_id FOREIGN KEY ("advertisement_id") REFERENCES advertisements ("advertisement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "working_costs" (
  "working_cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each working cost */,
  "advertisement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertisement associated with the working cost */,
  "working_cost_date" TEXT /* Date of the working cost */,
  "working_cost_amount" REAL /* Amount of the working cost */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost (e.g., production, distribution, creative) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cost */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Name of the vendor or service provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("working_cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_working_costs_advertisement_id FOREIGN KEY ("advertisement_id") REFERENCES advertisements ("advertisement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitors" (
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client competing with the competitor */,
  "competitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the competitor */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the competitor */,
  "market_share" REAL /* Market share of the competitor */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the competitor's website */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact details for the competitor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitors_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitor_performance" (
  "competitor_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor performance */,
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competitor performing */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., impressions, clicks, conversions) */,
  "performance_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competitor's campaign (if applicable) */,
  "media_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media channel used by the competitor */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the competitor's advertisement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitor_performance_competitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("competitor_id") REFERENCES competitors ("competitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitor_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitor_performance_media_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_channel_id") REFERENCES media_channels ("media_channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data */,
  "market_data_date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "market_data_metric" TEXT /* Name of the market data metric (e.g., impressions, clicks, conversions) */,
  "market_data_value" REAL /* Value of the market data metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., industry report, survey) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the market data */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the market data pertains */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "EQ_category" (
  "EQ_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EQ category */,
  "EQ_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the EQ category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the EQ category */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("EQ_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "EQ_subcategory" (
  "EQ_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EQ subcategory */,
  "EQ_subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the EQ subcategory */,
  "subcategory_description" TEXT /* Description of the EQ subcategory */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("EQ_subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_EQ_subcategory_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES EQ_category ("EQ_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pct_PromoMarketDollars_Subcategory" (
  "pct_PromoMarketDollars_Subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percentage of promo market dollars for subcategory */,
  "EQ_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the EQ subcategory */,
  "pct_PromoMarketDollars_Subcategory_value" REAL /* Percentage of promo market dollars for the subcategory */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data is applicable */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the data is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pct_PromoMarketDollars_Subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pct_PromoMarketDollars_Subcategory_EQ_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("EQ_subcategory_id") REFERENCES EQ_subcategory ("EQ_subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "RPI_Subcategory" (
  "RPI_Subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RPI for subcategory */,
  "EQ_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the EQ subcategory */,
  "RPI_Subcategory_value" REAL /* RPI for the subcategory */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data is applicable */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the data is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("RPI_Subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_RPI_Subcategory_EQ_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("EQ_subcategory_id") REFERENCES EQ_subcategory ("EQ_subcategory_id")
)
